title: Wave-Particle Duality: The Quantum Nature of Reality
description: Discover the revolutionary concept that fundamentally changed physics - matter and light exhibit both wave and particle properties. This duality is the gateway to understanding quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Explain wave-particle duality and its historical significance
Describe key experiments that revealed quantum behavior
Understand de Broglie wavelength and its implications
Connect wave-particle duality to quantum computing concepts
Appreciate why classical intuition fails at the quantum scale
